visual_description: In a dimly lit outdoor setting at night, a lone figure in light clothing stands on a slope while a distant structure glows with warm lights along a staircase. The camera then shifts to reveal a massive, bald creature with a rugged texture, its head turned slightly as if observing the surroundings. Finally, a group of silhouetted individuals moves across the dark terrain, with a building illuminated by numerous windows visible in the background.
